subject: Warp Extracting Subtomograms Multiple Times
body:
*Dear All,*

I've encountered an interesting behavior of Warp when reconstructing 
subtomograms:

I go in with a particle list of ~15k particles (from Relion 3.1), out comes 
a list of ~23k particles.

I guess this is one way to lift up that FSC curve 😜

Apparently, for some of the tomograms particles are extracted 2x and 3x. 🤔 
[didn't see an obvious pattern such as this would always happen to the 3rd, 
6th, ... or 4th, 8th, ...  tomogram].

The setup:

Warp 1.0.9 on
Windows 10 Pro 64 Bit, Intel Xeon Gold 6230
384 GB RAM, 6xRTX 2080 Ti

Anybody ever seen this?

[I'm currently testing if this happens, too, if I disable some of the GPUs; 
will report later]

Thanks,

Philipp.
